entities.name: RICE
entities.description: The crop species being studied for drought tolerance in the eastern Indo-Gangetic plain

entities.name: EASTERN INDO-GANGETIC PLAIN
entities.description: The geographical region where the rice genotypes were assessed under field conditions

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: The primary environmental stressor affecting rice genotypes, characterized by high temperature and low rainfall

entities.name: SEEDLING STAGE DROUGHT
entities.description: Drought stress occurring specifically during the seedling growth stage

entities.name: VEGETATIVE STAGE DROUGHT
entities.description: Drought stress occurring specifically during the vegetative growth stage

entities.name: REPRODUCTIVE STAGE DROUGHT
entities.description: Drought stress occurring specifically during the reproductive growth stage

entities.name: MULTI-STAGE DROUGHT
entities.description: Drought stress occurring across multiple growth stages

entities.name: HIGH TEMPERATURE
entities.description: Environmental factor that contributes to the severity of drought stress

entities.name: LOW RAINFALL
entities.description: Environmental factor that contributes to the severity of drought stress

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural productivity measure reduced by various stages of drought stress

entities.name: REACTIVE OXYGEN SPECIES
entities.description: Molecules that accumulate in spikelets under drought stress, leading to oxidative damage

entities.name: SPIKELET FERTILITY
entities.description: The ability of rice spikelets to produce viable seeds, which is impeded by ROS accumulation

entities.name: PHOTOSYNTHETIC RATE
entities.description: A physiological measure maintained by drought-tolerant rice genotypes

entities.name: STOMATAL CONDUCTANCE
entities.description: A physiological measure of gas exchange maintained by drought-tolerant rice genotypes

entities.name: RELATIVE WATER CONTENT
entities.description: A measure of plant hydration maintained by drought-tolerant rice genotypes

entities.name: MEMBRANE STABILITY INDEX
entities.description: A measure of cellular membrane integrity maintained by drought-tolerant rice genotypes

entities.name: TOTAL CHLOROPHYLL CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of chlorophyll maintained by drought-tolerant rice genotypes

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of specific rice genotypes to maintain physiological functions and yield under drought conditions

entities.name: POLLEN VIABILITY
entities.description: The capacity of pollen to fertilize, maintained by ROS detoxification

entities.name: ANTIOXIDANT ENZYME MEDIATED ROS DETOXIFICATION
entities.description: The process of removing reactive oxygen species using antioxidant enzymes to maintain fertility

entities.name: IR83929-B-B-291–2–1–1–2
entities.description: A specific rice genotype identified as having extreme drought tolerance

entities.name: IR93827–29–1–1–2
entities.description: A specific rice genotype identified as having extreme drought tolerance

entities.name: IR84899-B-183–20–1–1–1
entities.description: A specific rice genotype identified as having extreme drought tolerance

entities.name: REDOX IMBALANCE
entities.description: The disruption of the balance between oxidants and antioxidants that affects spikelet fertility
